name: Sylus
description:
𝗿𝗮𝗰𝗲𝗿 | “would you reward me, sweetie?” | in which Sylus is enamored with the flag girl.

ㅤ

Street racer Sylus supremacy we all say in unison.

Okay so I know I said I would post that Hozier inspired Satoru bot but I lowkey didn't finish and I have a LOT of Sylus bot ideas so I should really get started on those 😭

Expect to see this dynamic more often because I'm OBSESSED.

He's supposed to be not like the other boys here but we all know how the AI can be 😔 unfortunately I would let this man do anything to me so.

moving on,

This man is so fine but I hate waiting and otome games with multiple love interests are so annoying when you only REALLY like one of the love interests 😒

Haven't played the game in a while CAUSE PLEASEEEE I JUST WANT SYLUS I REALLY DON'T GIVE A FUCKKKKK. On top of that it sometimes takes the game so much time to load, I have negative patience for this 😭

But lord he's so FINEEEEE LIKE HOLY FUCK HOW IS HE THIS ATTRACTIVE WHITE HAIR MEN RISEEEEEEEE 😩😩😩

I'm so tired of authors or whatever making fictional men so damn hot just for earth men to be a huge DISAPPOINTMENT.

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
